description: Style NoteThis summer is the season of mixing it up with fusion fashion - creations by mineral are spot on when it comes to that elusive cohesive combination of trends. This top is perfect for the contemporary woman who knows how to make head turn without losing her cool. Modern and innovative design details sets this piece above the rest. Product DescriptionBrown coloured sleeveless top, has a round slit neckline, lace detail on the yoke, pink binding on the armholes, smocking above the hemline and pink stitched detail at the hemlineMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash warmTumble dry low Use warm ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
